# Backlog Item

- Backlog Item ID: `FR-001`
- Title: `Publish consultant-focused hero and services narrative`
- Requirement: [`FR-001`](../requirements/FR-001.md)
- Persona/Actor: `Small-business owner or operations lead evaluating automation support`
- Value statement: `For small-business decision makers, deliver a clear consultant-focused hero and services narrative to achieve fast trust and clear next-step intent.`
- Acceptance criteria (behavior):
  - `Home page renders a hero section that states consultant role, target clients (small businesses), and service focus (AI, automation, software development).`
  - `Services section lists exactly 3 to 4 core offerings with outcome-first descriptions aligned to business problem solving.`
  - `Primary CTA communicates a direct consulting next step and navigates to contact page without broken routes or anchors.`
  - `Home page copy avoids generic agency language and uses first-person consultant positioning.`
- Dependencies: `FR-003 contact conversion path, approved consultant positioning copy.`
- Validation approach: `Route smoke checks, above-the-fold content assertions, CTA navigation verification on desktop and mobile.`
- Priority score: `95`
- Target window: `Phase 1`
- Links:
  - Requirement: [`requirements/FR-001.md`](../requirements/FR-001.md)
  - ADR: `adr/0001-static-first-baseline.md, adr/0003-extension-through-seams.md`
  - ICR: `n/a`
  - PR/changeset: `n/a`
